specs.title: cp-000: Empty references state text reads Use CmdShiftC to add citations
cp-001: References preview list shows only the first 5 cited references sorted by refere
cp-002: Reference preview cards show n truncated title and first-author family name or U
cp-003: View all X references appears only when there are more than 5 references
cp-004: Clicking View all X references opens the full Reference Sidebar
cp-005: AI Credits bar uses tokens_used over tokens_limit from getUserUsageStats
cp-006: If usage stats fail to load the credits bar falls back to 0 50000
cp-007: Write-mode AI intensity header is visible only when isLearnMode false
cp-008: Write-mode intensity options are exactly Focus Collaborate and Accelerate
cp-009: Active Focus chip uses sky styling Collaborate uses brand styling and Accelerate
cp-010: Inactive intensity chips use muted text with hover color only
cp-011: Write-mode description line below the chips updates to DRAFT_MODE_DESCRIPTIONSdr
cp-012: Default draft intensity is collaborate
cp-013: Learn-mode header is visible only when isLearnMode true
cp-014: Learn-mode helper text reads Guide Mode I wont write for you Ill teach you how
cp-015: Guide document-type button defaults to Select document type
cp-016: Guide document-type picker closes immediately after selecting a type
cp-017: Stage tracker is hidden until a guide document type has been selected
cp-018: Stage tracker completion styling depends only on array order not on any persiste
cp-019: Guide stages are clickable in non-linear order and simply update local guideStag
cp-020: Switching between Write and Learn mode does not clear the current chat transcrip
cp-021: Switching between Write and Learn mode changes the outgoing apichat mode between
cp-022: Chat placeholder reads Ask your AI research assistant in Write mode
cp-023: Chat placeholder reads Ask me to challenge your thinking in Learn mode
cp-024: Chat send button is disabled while loading or when the trimmed input is empty
cp-025: Submitting chat appends the user message locally before the network request star
cp-026: First successful chat submit creates a conversation through createConversation
cp-027: Conversation title is the first 80 characters of the initial prompt
cp-028: User messages are persisted through addMessage in the background and failures ar
cp-029: Assistant responses stream from apichat into a placeholder assistant bubble
cp-030: If apichat returns non-OK the panel shows dataerror or Chat failed
cp-031: If the response body is missing chat shows No response stream
cp-032: Transport-level chat failures show Failed to send message Check your API key
cp-033: Assistant loading placeholder uses three bouncing dots inside a brand-tinted bub
cp-034: Chat panel auto-scrolls to the bottom whenever messages changes
